commands.result: Confirmed local DB tables include projects, records, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, evidence_refs, record_sources, and blocks_fts.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select count(*) as project_count from projects; select count(*) as db_project_aliases from identity_aliases where kind='project'; select count(*) as db_project_do_not_merge from do_not_merge where kind='project';"
commands.result: Found 2119 project records, 87 existing project aliases, and 1 project do-not-merge row.
No selected alias_id appeared in prior Codex identity prep files through identity093 or in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (...) select p.alias,p.target,ia.target as existing_alias_target,dn.reason as do_not_merge_reason,ra.record_kind alias_kind,rt.record_kind target_kind from pairs p left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind=p.kind and ia.alias=p.alias left join do_not_merge dn on dn.kind=p.kind and ((dn.record_id_a=p.alias and dn.record_id_b=p.target) or (dn.record_id_a=p.target and dn.record_id_b=p.alias)) left join records ra on ra.record_id=p.alias left join records rt on rt.record_id=p.target;"
commands.result: All 8 alias/target ids resolve to record_kind project; existing_alias_target and do_not_merge_reason were empty for all pairs.
No selected alias_id is already mapped as a project alias in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
